Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}I'm not going to say much, though. In the end, it's your decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}After you graduate, are you planning on going to college, or getting a job?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Well, if you've already thought about it and made your choice, then there's nothing else for me to say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Well, you still have another year until you graduate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}It's okay if you still haven't decided. Just don't put it off for too long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}What's most important is that the decision is yours, and yours alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}If someone else makes it for you, you'll regret it later.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}And then, you'll have to live with the consequences, whatever they may be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}But to be honest, I'm not that worried about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}You've really matured over this last year. In fact, you've changed so much, I almost don't even recognize you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}What do you think has helped to bring about this change the most?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Well, whatever the reason, you should be proud of the young man you've become.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}That's all for now. I hope you have a successful third year.[n]{f 1 1}
